expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度]为总尺寸，[板厚度]为顶部、底部和侧面板的材料厚度，[背板厚度]为背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan bahagian Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan Atas, Bawah, dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng ở phần Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal na tabla ng Itaas, Ibaba at Gilid, [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal na tabla ng Background. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: သေတ္တာအတွက်အမှတ်များကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်အပေါ်ပိုင်း၊ အောက်ပိုင်းနှင့်နံဘေးရှိပစ္စည်းအထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ခံအထူဖြစ်သည်။(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនា​ទំហំក្តារសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺ​ជា​ការ​វាស់​ស្ទង់​សរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជា​កម្រាស់សម្ភារៈ​ក្តារ​ផ្នែក​លើ, ផ្នែក​ក្រោម និង​ផ្នែក​ចំហៀង, ហើយ [BackBoardThick] គឺជា​កម្រាស់សម្ភារៈ​ក្តារ​ផ្នែក​ខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດຄອຍສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນມາດຕະຖານທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມ𩢴ຈຂອງຂອງຕູ້ສໍາລັບທາດຄວາມ, [BackBoardThick] ບໍ່ແມ້ນໄຟນານ!(AI translated, fintain please check)
